defaultError.title: We’re sorry, something went wrong
defaultError.detail:
Please try again in a moment.
If this happens again, contact us.

overduePartial.title: Your mortgage is overdue
overduePartial.detail: Please settle the overdue amount first. Then you can make an extra repayment or pay off your mortgage.

overdueFull.title: Your mortgage is overdue
overdueFull.detail: Please settle the overdue amount first. Then you can pay off your mortgage.

remedialPartial.title: Your extra repayment request cannot be processed at this time

calculatorPartial.title: Extra mortgage repayment
calculatorPartial.message: The earliest available date is {date}. You can pay up to {amount} at no extra cost.
calculatorPartial.dateInfo: We need more time to process an extra repayment request. That is why the earliest available dates are at least 7 days from today.
calculatorPartial.repaymentType: How would you like to adjust the remaining installments?
calculatorPartial.repaymentLowerInfo: We will reduce your monthly installment. The term will remain unchanged.
calculatorPartial.repaymentShorterInfo: We’ll shorten your mortgage term and recalculate your monthly instalment amount.

reasonSelection.title: What is the reason for the extra repayment?

values.title: Property sale within the first 24 months of the mortgage
Property sale after 24 months of the mortgage
Joint property settlement after 24 months of the mortgage

calculatorPartial.originComment: Add information about the source of funds

originSelection.title: Where do the funds mainly come from?
originSelection.detail: If the option that matches your situation is not available, choose “Other” and add details in the comment.

calculatorPartial.account: Where will the money be paid from?

accountSelection.title: From which account do you want to make the payment?
accountSelection.detail: Select Current account if you are making the extra repayment from the account you normally use to repay your mortgage. If you are making the payment from a different account, choose Technical account.

calculatorPartial.feeInfo: This is the amount of reasonably incurred costs related to early repayment.
calculatorPartial.referenceTypeInfo: Did you choose an extra repayment in a month other than the current one? If so, the costs may change. If that happens, we will send you a new document with the updated costs to Internet Banka no later than 10 days before the extra repayment date.
calculatorPartial.maritalProperty: If funds from joint property are used, I declare that the other spouse or partner is aware of the repayment and agrees to it.

calculatorFinal.title: Mortgage payoff
calculatorFinal.message: The earliest available date is {date}. You can pay off your mortgage without any fees.
calculatorFinal.dateInfo: We need more time to process a mortgage payoff request. That is why the earliest available dates are at least 7 days from today.
calculatorFinal.lastPaymentDate: the last regular installment will take place
calculatorFinal.repaymentDate: your mortgage payoff will take place

reasonSelection.title: What is the reason for paying off the mortgage?

values.title: Property sale within the first 24 months of the mortgage
Property sale after 24 months of the mortgage
Joint property settlement after 24 months of the mortgage

calculatorFinal.originComment: Add information about the source of funds

originSelection.title: Where do the funds mainly come from?
originSelection.detail: If the option that matches your situation is not available, choose “Other” and add details in the comment.

calculatorFinal.account: Where will the money be paid from?

accountSelection.title: From which account do you want to make the payment?
accountSelection.detail: Select Current account if you are making the extra repayment from the account you normally use to repay your mortgage. If you are making the payment from a different account, choose Technical account.

cadastreInfo.title: Land Registry consent
cadastreInfo.detail:
Select this option if you want to issue consent to establish a second-priority lien and a prohibition against alienation and encumbrance.

You can close the current account no earlier than 40 days after submitting the mortgage payoff request.

calculatorFinal.cadastreDetail: You do not need to handle anything at the Land Registry. We will pay the administrative fee of CZK 1,600 for you and then debit this amount to your account.
calculatorFinal.feeInfo: This is the amount of reasonably incurred costs related to early repayment.
calculatorFinal.referenceTypeInfo: Did you choose to pay off your mortgage in a different month than the current one? If so, the costs may change. If that happens, we will send you a new document with the updated costs to Internet Banka no later than 10 days before the mortgage payoff date.
calculatorFinal.maritalProperty: If funds from joint property are used, I declare that the other spouse or partner is aware of the repayment and agrees to it.

reviewPartial.title: Review extra repayment details
reviewPartial.message: If the annuity installment amount changes, the monthly insurance payment from BNP Paribas Cardif Pojišťovna, a.s. will also change, if it was arranged in your Mortgage Loan Agreement.

reviewFinal.title: Review mortgage payoff details
reviewFinal.dateInfo: The last regular installment will take place

victory.title: We have received your request and are processing it
victory.detail: On the next business day, you will find the documents related to your request in Smart Banka and Internet Banka under Documents.

victoryParitalDocument.title: The selected reason allows an extra repayment free of charge—just upload the document
victoryParitalDocument.detail:
On the next business day, you will find a statement with information on which document to upload in Internet Banka and Smart Banka under Documents.

You can then submit the required document in Internet Banka under Extra repayment > Upload documents.

victoryFinalDocument.title: The selected reason allows a mortgage payoff free of charge—just upload the document
victoryFinalDocument.detail:
On the next business day, you will find a statement with information on which document to upload in Internet Banka and Smart Banka under Documents.

You can then submit the required document in Internet Banka under Mortgage payoff > Upload documents.

detailPartial.title: Extra mortgage repayment
detailPartial.message: We are processing your extra repayment request. If you do not see the latest information here (repayment amount, remaining balance, costs, etc.), please check again on the next business day.
detailPartial.freeInfo:
The selected reason allows an extra repayment free of charge—just upload the document.

You can then submit the required document in Internet Banka under Extra repayment > Upload documents.
detailPartial.footer: If the annuity installment amount changes, the monthly insurance payment from BNP Paribas Cardif Pojišťovna, a.s. will also change, if it was arranged in your Mortgage Loan Agreement.

detailFinal.title: Mortgage payoff
detailFinal.message: We are processing your mortgage payoff request. If you do not see the latest information here (amounts, payoff details, costs, etc.), please check again on the next business day.
detailFinal.freeInfo: The selected reason allows a mortgage payoff free of charge—just upload the document. You can then submit the required document in Internet Banka under Mortgage payoff > Upload documents.

cancelPartial.title: Do you want to cancel the extra repayment request?
cancelPartial.detail: If you cancel it, the extra repayment will not take place and you will continue paying as before.
cancelPartial.victory: Your extra repayment request has been canceled

cancelFinal.title: Do you want to cancel the mortgage payoff request?
cancelFinal.detail: If you cancel it, the mortgage payoff will not take place and you will continue paying as before.
cancelFinal.victory: Your mortgage payoff request has been canceled.
